title: Intent-router classification (Phase 2)
description: Validates the free-text intent classification in intent-router.md § 3 before the router branches on confidence (SPEC-workflow-phases-2-5.md § 2b). Replaces the prior convention of branching on unvalidated parsed YAML: a malformed or typo'd classification fails the gate structurally instead of silently mis-routing. NOTE (A1): 'mode' is validated here only as a non-empty string; the dynamic membership check (mode ∈ the glob-discovered mode set) is an orchestrator post-check after schema validation — a static JSON schema cannot enumerate a runtime-discovered mode list. additionalProperties:false.

mode.description: The classified mode name. Schema checks non-empty string only; the orchestrator then post-validates membership in the glob-discovered mode set and re-asks on a miss (no silent mis-route).

confidence.description: Routing confidence. high = dispatch directly; medium = confirm before dispatch; low = mandatory confirm with ranked candidates.

rationale.description: One-line reason for the classification, surfaced to the founder on dispatch/confirm.
